routes.title: SuperSXO — Sovereign Search Experience Optimization
routes.purpose: Primary entry point and asset introduction. Establishes the SuperSXO thesis and navigates users to core framework content.
routes.publication_rule: Must pass all quality gates. Must define the SXO thesis. Must not contain placeholder sections.

routes.title: What Is SXO? — Search Experience Optimization Defined
routes.purpose: Canonical reference definition of SXO. Establishes SuperSXO.com as the authority layer for the discipline.
routes.publication_rule: Must pass content gate and claim gate. Definitions must be doctrine-classified. No unsupported claims.

routes.title: The SuperSXO Framework — From Search Intent to Strategic Outcome
routes.purpose: Defines the seven-layer SXO journey model. The structural centerpiece of the SuperSXO intellectual property.
routes.publication_rule: Must pass all gates. Framework must be complete, not partial. No placeholder layers.

routes.title: SuperSXO Score — Self-Assessment Diagnostic
routes.purpose: Free self-assessment tool that scores a site's search-to-action performance. First approved monetization surface via upsell to paid audit.
routes.publication_rule: Must pass all gates including monetization gate. Score logic must be defensible. No fake urgency.

routes.title: SXO Audit — Diagnostic Report
routes.purpose: Paid diagnostic audit offer. The primary commercial conversion path tied to SXOSolution.com.
routes.publication_rule: Must pass monetization gate. Offer must be high-trust. No fake scarcity. No low-trust lead traps.

routes.title: SEO vs SXO — Understanding the Difference
routes.purpose: Reference page distinguishing SEO from SXO. Supports category authority and addresses high-intent informational queries.
routes.publication_rule: Must pass content and claim gates. Comparison must be precise, not promotional. No competitor disparagement.

routes.title: AI Search Experience — SXO in the Age of Generative Search
routes.purpose: Positions SuperSXO as relevant to AI-driven search. Establishes early authority in the emerging AI search readiness category.
routes.publication_rule: Must pass claim gate carefully. Interpretive claims must be classified as interpretation. No unsupported AI performance claims.

routes.title: SuperSXO Methodology — The Governance System for Search Experience
routes.purpose: Full methodology documentation. Reinforces intellectual property, supports acquisition positioning, and underpins agency licensing.
routes.publication_rule: Must pass all gates. Methodology must be complete and defensible. Reinforces buyer logic.

routes.title: Acquisition — SuperSXO Strategic Asset Positioning
routes.purpose: Signals to potential strategic acquirers that the asset is intentionally built and positioned for acquisition. Reinforces buyer logic.
routes.publication_rule: Must pass all gates. Must be dignified and institutional. No low-trust sales language.

routes.title: Tribunal Viewport — Search Experience Examination Model
routes.purpose: Non-public interaction prototype for the Tribunal Viewport / Adjudication Lens mechanic. Tests the seven-article rising-from-frame interaction model. Never to be published as a production route.
routes.publication_rule: Prototype only. Must not be published to production. Must not generate output/tribunal-viewport/index.html. Governed exclusively by data/prototype-registry.json.
